field_description: Classifies an additive Massage Nexus responsibility used as a permission bundle. A role never replaces the user's ordinary personal capabilities and does not by itself identify ownership of an establishment.

field_option.option_description: Highest project decision responsibility, still subject to audit and high-risk safeguards.
Administers approved editorial areas according to granted permissions.
Handles assigned moderation work according to granted permissions.
Reviews assigned claims, credentials, contacts, or evidence according to granted permissions.
Maintains approved structured records and taxonomy according to granted permissions.
Handles approved technical and system operations under critical safeguards.
Translates assigned languages and content without automatic publication authority.
Maintains specifically assigned community-managed records.
Performs approved operational work for one or more establishments without implying ownership.
Manages approved practitioner responsibilities while retaining ordinary user capabilities.
Performs approved teaching responsibilities in Massage Campus.
Participates in approved Massage Campus learning activities.

field_description: Identifies the boundary within which a workspace access assignment applies. The related scope_record_id supplies the specific record when the scope is not global.

field_option.option_description: Applies across Massage Nexus within the granted permission.
Applies only to one establishment record.
Applies only to one practitioner record.
Applies only to one assigned language.
Applies only to one editorial category, publication, or assignment boundary.
Applies only to one Massage Campus course.

field_description: Lifecycle state of a role or direct-permission assignment. Only active assignments within their effective and expiry times grant access.

field_option.option_description: Assignment has been proposed but does not grant access.
Assignment currently grants its approved access.
Assignment passed its approved expiry and no longer grants access.
Assignment was withdrawn and no longer grants access.

field_description: Classifies how a user is connected to an establishment. It is separate from workspace permissions, and a declaration remains unverified until the applicable review succeeds.

field_option.option_description: The user is contributing public information without claiming a business relationship.
The user declares legal or beneficial ownership of the establishment.
The user declares an investment relationship without implying sole ownership or management authority.
The user declares responsibility for managing the establishment or one of its branches.
The user declares authority to operate the establishment's Massage Nexus workspace without claiming ownership.
The user declares another approved representative relationship requiring verification.

field_description: Current verification and lifecycle state of one user-to-establishment relationship. It does not describe the user's separate workspace access assignment.

field_option.option_description: Relationship has been declared but is not yet verified.
Relationship is verified and currently active.
Relationship is contested and must not independently grant trust or access.
Relationship no longer applies but remains in history.

field_description: Classifies the operation proposed by a user or staff contribution independently from the target collection.

field_option.option_description: Proposes a new record that does not yet exist.
Proposes a factual correction to an existing record.
Proposes recording that an establishment or another supported target has closed.
Proposes linking or merging records believed to represent the same target.
Proposes new provenance or supporting-source information.
Proposes translated content without automatic publication authority.

field_description: Workflow state of a contribution from private draft through review and final disposition.

field_option.option_description: Private contribution not yet submitted for review.
Submitted contribution awaiting an authorized review decision.
Reviewer requested clarification or revision from the submitter.
Authorized reviewer accepted the applicable proposed information.
Authorized reviewer declined the contribution with a recorded reason.
Submitter withdrew the unapproved contribution.
Contribution is retained as inactive history.
